subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Be thou a divine merchant and from the realm of contingent being come forth with merchandise acceptable at the threshold of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی بازرگان ربانی شو و از اقلیم امکان با متاعی مقبول در ساحت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @spiritual transformation, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
